channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Lagging consumer spending and business investment offset the…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Lagging consumer spending and business investment offset the boost from strong exports thanks partly to the boom in artificial intelligence. n.pr/3T033wp

item.title: "I talk to a guy in a 'Claude Squad' shirt, who tells me tha…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
"I talk to a guy in a 'Claude Squad' shirt, who tells me that morality is 'an intellectual artifact,' a 'convenient fiction similar to money.'"

Read: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...
item.content:encoded:
"I talk to a guy in a 'Claude Squad' shirt, who tells me that morality is 'an intellectual artifact,' a 'convenient fiction similar to money.'"

Read: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...

item.title: "At an event called 'Solve Metaethics,' I hear things like '…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
"At an event called 'Solve Metaethics,' I hear things like 'AI is wiser and kinder than us,' and 'flowers are moral progress,' and 'ethics is all engineering.'"

More: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...
item.content:encoded:
"At an event called 'Solve Metaethics,' I hear things like 'AI is wiser and kinder than us,' and 'flowers are moral progress,' and 'ethics is all engineering.'"

More: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...

item.title: Old rivals. New stakes. A World Cup final spot on the line. …

item.title: Watch Peter Cetera and All His Replacements Sing Chicago’s ’…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Watch Peter Cetera and All His Replacements Sing Chicago’s ’25 or 6 to 4′ Across Six Decades

Chicago has wrapped up just about every show they've ever played with this 1970 classic, even as they've changed their lineup more often than an NBA team.

🎸 bit.ly/4aTUxFi
item.content:encoded:
Watch Peter Cetera and All His Replacements Sing Chicago’s ’25 or 6 to 4′ Across Six Decades

Chicago has wrapped up just about every show they've ever played with this 1970 classic, even as they've changed their lineup more often than an NBA team.

🎸 bit.ly/4aTUxFi

item.title: The oldest bridge in Paris was draped in fabric last month t…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The oldest bridge in Paris was draped in fabric last month to appear like a mountain cave, in an installation by the artist JR. Unlike a real cave, though, it didn't provide respite from a brutal heat wave. n.pr/4bmXdeM
item.content:encoded: The oldest bridge in Paris was draped in fabric last month to appear like a mountain cave, in an installation by the artist JR. Unlike a real cave, though, it didn't provide respite from a brutal heat wave. n.pr/4bmXdeM

item.title: Swapmeet will release their spectacular debut album 'Mount Z…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Swapmeet will release their spectacular debut album 'Mount Zero' at week's end.

Check out one last single, "Bonny," and read our Band To Watch interview with the Australian indie band:
item.content:encoded:
Swapmeet will release their spectacular debut album 'Mount Zero' at week's end.

Check out one last single, "Bonny," and read our Band To Watch interview with the Australian indie band:

item.title: Blanche won Senate confirmation early in President Trump's s…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Blanche won Senate confirmation early in President Trump's second term to serve as the No. 2 official at the Justice Department. Now he faces a contentious hearing as he seeks the top job. n.pr/44va7ni
item.content:encoded: Blanche won Senate confirmation early in President Trump's second term to serve as the No. 2 official at the Justice Department. Now he faces a contentious hearing as he seeks the top job. n.pr/44va7ni

item.title: The blaze that destroyed Tomorrowland's main stage just days…

item.content:encoded: The blaze that destroyed Tomorrowland's main stage just days before its 2025 edition was caused by an ethanol leak, sources claim

item.title: Donald Trump praised ICE after the agency killed two men in …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Donald Trump praised ICE after the agency killed two men in vehicles in under a week, writing that agents “are doing a GREAT job” and calling for traffic stops to resume.
www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
Donald Trump praised ICE after the agency killed two men in vehicles in under a week, writing that agents “are doing a GREAT job” and calling for traffic stops to resume.
www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche is set to appear before…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche is set to appear before the Senate for his confirmation hearing. And, Immigration and Customs Enforcement has paused most traffic stops after recent deadly shootings. n.pr/4w0GciL
item.content:encoded: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche is set to appear before the Senate for his confirmation hearing. And, Immigration and Customs Enforcement has paused most traffic stops after recent deadly shootings. n.pr/4w0GciL

item.title: AI is a fast-growing business expense. Some companies are cu…

item.description: AI is a fast-growing business expense. Some companies are cutting costs by switching to cheaper Chinese AI models. n.pr/4wKr49i
item.content:encoded: AI is a fast-growing business expense. Some companies are cutting costs by switching to cheaper Chinese AI models. n.pr/4wKr49i

item.title: "Extreme heat" is in the forecast this summer. How do people…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: "Extreme heat" is in the forecast this summer. How do people cope if they don't have air conditioning? Here are suggestions from a heat researcher who grew up in a very hot, AC-less place. n.pr/4weW6Gr
item.content:encoded: "Extreme heat" is in the forecast this summer. How do people cope if they don't have air conditioning? Here are suggestions from a heat researcher who grew up in a very hot, AC-less place. n.pr/4weW6Gr

item.title: Iran threatened to block all oil exporting routes in the reg…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Iran threatened to block all oil exporting routes in the region on Wednesday in response to the U.S. maritime blockade of Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz. n.pr/4fBaEKz
item.content:encoded: Iran threatened to block all oil exporting routes in the region on Wednesday in response to the U.S. maritime blockade of Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz. n.pr/4fBaEKz

item.content:encoded:
Appare!はブルベ・イエベとか骨ストとか気にしない
新曲は「骨格アイドル♡虹ベユニコーン」🦄
